creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #33)

Basically, they're not missing but misnamed. See comment #3.

I *think* it goes wrong when the substitution for PYTHON_PYOEXTENSION is done in the plist. Where else could it happen?

But looking at /usr/ports/Mk/Uses/python.mk it escapes me *why* it goes wrong.
